content.text:
After three passes the task continues to fail in ways that require human judgement — the worker is being asked to reverse-engineer an undocumented binary protocol. Marking unachievable.

```json
{"action":"review","worker_id":"mock-1","decision":"mark_unachievable","rationale":"task requires manual reverse-engineering of an undocumented binary protocol; no further automated progress possible."}
```
